Perfect Focus.note: Increases total weapon damage by 5% every second while aiming with 8x scope or higher, up to 50%.

Perfect Headhunter.note: After killing an enemy with a headshot, your next weapon hit within 30s deals 125% of that killing blow's damage in addition to it.

Perfect Overwatch.note: After staying in cover for 10s, increase your and all allies' total weapon and skill damage by 12% as long as you remain in cover.

Perfect Mad Bomber.note: Grenade radius increased by 50%. Grenades that kill an enemy are refunded. Grenades can be cooked.

Perfect Skilled.note: Skill kills have a 25% chance to reset skill cooldowns.

Perfect Tag Team.note: The last enemy damaged with a skill is marked. Dealing weapon damage to that enemy reduces active cooldowns by 6s. Cooldown: 4s.

Perfect Tamper Proof.note: Enemies that walk within 3m of your hive, turret, remote pulse, or decoy are shocked. Cooldown per skill: 10s.

Perfect Reassigned.note: Killing an enemy adds 1 round of random special ammo into your sidearm. Cooldown: 15s.

Perfect Efficient.note: Using an armor kit has a 50% chance to not consume the armor kit. Specialization armor kit bonuses are increased by 100%.

Perfect Empathic Resolve.note: Repairing an ally increases their weapon and skill damage by up to 15% for 20s.

Perfect Kinetic Momentum.note: Each active skill generates stacks granting +1% skill damage and +2% skill repair, up to 15 stacks.

Perfect Vanguard.note: Deploying a shield makes it invulnerable for 5s and grants 45% armor as bonus armor to allies for 20s.

Perfect Glass Cannon.note: All damage amplified by 25%. All damage taken amplified by 50%.

Perfect Protector.note: When your shield is damaged, you gain +5% and all other allies gain +15% of your armor as bonus armor for 3s. Cooldown: 3s.

Perfect Adrenaline Rush.note: When you are within 10m of an enemy, gain 20% bonus armor for 5s. Stacks up to 3 times. Cooldown: 5s.

Perfect Calculated.note: Kills from cover reduce skill cooldowns by 10%.

Perfect Overclock.note: You and allies within 7m of your deployed skills gain +25% reload speed and reduces active cooldowns by 0.2 each second.

Perfect Concussion.note: Headshots grant +10% headshot damage for 10s, stacking up to 5 times.

Perfect Perfect Obliterate.note: Critical hits increase weapon damage by 1% for 5s, stacking up to 25%. Stacks refresh on crit.

Perfect Perfect Intimidate.note: +40% weapon damage to enemies within 10m while you have bonus armor.

Perfect Perfect Spark.note: Applying a status effect grants +20% weapon damage for 15s.

Perfect Perfect Glass Cannon.note: All damage amplified by 30%. All damage taken amplified by 50%.

Perfect Perfect Gunslinger.note: Weapon swapping increases total weapon damage by 28% for 5s. This buff is lost for 5s if you weapon swap while it is active.

Perfect Perfect Vanguard.note: Deploying a shield makes it invulnerable for 5s and grants 60% of your armor as bonus armor to all allies for 20s.

Perfect Perfect Headhunter.note: After landing a headshot, your next weapon shot deals +150% of that weapon's damage.
